description: Perform a supply chain network analysis to visualize delivery routes by connecting retail stores to their nearest warehouses. Using the warehouse layer (/home/ga/GIS_Data/logistics/warehouses.geojson) and the store layer (/home/ga/GIS_Data/logistics/retail_stores.geojson), generate a line layer representing the distance to the nearest hub for each store. Use the 'name' attribute for the hub layer and record measurements in meters. Export the resulting connections as a GeoJSON file to /home/ga/GIS_Data/exports/hub_connections.geojson.
